displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: The Sith War #2: The Battle of Coruscant
synopsis: Ulic Qel-Droma spent years learning to control the Force. He wanted to be on the side of the good, a member of the Jedi elite. But it is not the Force one must control to become a Jedi; rather, one must learn to control oneself. Ulic Qel-Droma has tasted power, and now he cannot fight the dark hunger inside him…
title: Tales of the Jedi: The Sith War #2: The Battle of Coruscant
